goals.short_name: British Columbians can easily get help from government in person, by phone, and online

main_services.name: Get government ID and life event documents
Keep your information up to date with government

goals.short_name: People and businesses have secure digital identity to access government services online
Government information is open, protected, and accountable to the public
B.C.'s registries, procurement, and connectivity connect people and businesses to the economy

main_services.name: Register and search a business or organization

acts.full_name: Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act
acts.summary: Gives the public a right of access to records held by public bodies and protects personal privacy by governing the collection, use, and disclosure of personal information.

sections.title: Right of access to records
sections.description: Sets out the right to request access to records in the custody or control of a public body, including access to one's own personal information and personal information about someone else.

services.name: Request your personal information from government records
Request personal information for someone else

acts.summary: Enables government to collect, use, and disclose personal information to identify and eliminate systemic racism and advance racial equity, and requires annual publication of related statistics.

sections.title: Publish statistics or other information
sections.description: Requires the director of statistics to publish statistics or other information respecting systemic racism and racial equity by June 1 each year.

services.name: View statistics on systemic racism and racial equity

acts.summary: Governs the incorporation, recognition, and ongoing corporate filings of companies in British Columbia, administered through BC Registries.

sections.title: Incorporation and corporate filings
sections.description: Governs how companies are incorporated, recognized, and maintained on the corporate register, including annual reports and changes to directors and share structure.

services.name: Incorporate or manage a company
services.ms_name: Register and search a business or organization
